# Sage Outdoor Advisory – Resources

> Outdoor hospitality data, expert guides, and property discovery. Interactive glamping map (1,266+ properties), 19+ guides, 57+ glossary terms, and feasibility/appraisal service pages.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://resources.sageoutdooradvisory.com/en): Resources hub
- [Glamping Map](https://resources.sageoutdooradvisory.com/en/map): Interactive map with location, unit type, and rate filters
- [Guides](https://resources.sageoutdooradvisory.com/en/guides): Feasibility, appraisal, and industry guides
- [Glossary](https://resources.sageoutdooradvisory.com/en/glossary): Industry term definitions
- [Partners](https://resources.sageoutdooradvisory.com/en/partners): Partner organizations
- [Glamping Feasibility Study](https://resources.sageoutdooradvisory.com/en/landing/glamping-feasibility-study): Service overview
- [Sitemap](https://resources.sageoutdooradvisory.com/sitemap.xml): Full URL index

## Services

- Glamping feasibility studies
- RV resort feasibility studies
- Campground feasibility studies
- Glamping, RV resort, and campground appraisals

## Contact

- Website: https://sageoutdooradvisory.com
- Contact: https://sageoutdooradvisory.com/contact-us
